displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 4
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: The Old Republic (2010) #1-6, Star Wars: The Old Republic – The Lost Suns (2011) #1-5, Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith – Spiral (2012) #1-5; material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #17 and Star Wars Visionaries (2005)
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 4
